data.body:
G3 container coverage audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child 822a "Honest bidirectional round-trip probe; de-encode 'expected-bug' guards"), re-cross-checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/59ef/822a/8937/fe57).

OWNED CRITERIA — FULLY covered by this child:
- Parent SC4 ("Bidirectional round-trips (comments, links, parent) for the real Jira shapes are asserted, and no probe encodes a bug as expected") → 822a AC1 (hermetic bidirectional round-trip of comments/links/parent through the production path) + AC2 (every NOT-SYNCED/"as expected" probe guard converted to fail-when-the-gap-closes / removed) + AC3 (live variant documented for real-Jira directions). FULLY.
- Parent AC5 ("Bidirectional comment/link/parent round-trip is asserted hermetically; every 'expected-bug' probe guard is converted to fail-when-the-gap-closes") → 822a AC1 (clause 1) + AC2 (clause 2). FULLY.
- Contributes to SC5/AC6 posture via 822a AC4 (assertions check round-trip outcomes, not whole-blob equality).

DELEGATION — criteria not owned are correctly assigned to named siblings; declared OUT item (producer↔consumer schema/contract → story B/8937) is consistent with the roster and with 822a's declared depends_on fe57:
- AC1/SC1 → 8937 (schema SSOT) + fe57 (real-payload fixtures/fake) + 59ef (verified-fake fidelity).
- AC2 → 8937 (round-trip contract) + fe57 (fixtures).
- AC3/SC2 → 33d0 (collapse dual outbound appliers).
- AC4/SC3 → 2359 (sub-op telemetry + silent-no-op canary).
- AC7 → structural/aggregate epic roll-up.

No per-criterion coverage gap is attributable to child 822a itself; its owned SC4/AC5 are fully covered.

The single roster-level AC6 gap ("a documented anti-change-detector guardrail GOVERNS new tests" — every child, incl. 822a AC4, only APPLIES the posture to its own tests; no sibling produces the documented governing artifact for future/new reconciler tests; natural home keystone 8937 or a small dedicated child) is already filed as an identical structured finding across siblings 2359/33d0/59ef/8937/fe57 AND twice on this ticket. NOT re-filed here to avoid duplication. No NEW coverage finding for this pairing — child 822a's owned criteria (SC4/AC5) are fully covered.
